productVision: Transition our legacy keyword search to a semantic, natural-language search engine to help users find complex software components using conversational queries, thereby increasing asset reuse.

targetAudience.name: Frontend Developer
painPoints: Cannot find existing components if they don't know the exact file name.
Wastes time rebuilding UI elements that already exist.
targetAudience.primaryGoal: Quickly locate and integrate existing React components based on visual or behavioral descriptions.

designConstraints: Must fit within the existing global navigation header.
Search results must appear inline without requiring a page reload.

userStories.iWantTo: type 'blue button with a cart icon'
userStories.soThat: the system returns the `PrimaryActionBtn` component even if the word 'blue' isn't in the component's title.

uxTransition.interactionNotes: The search bar should expand smoothly on focus. A skeleton loader should pulse while waiting for the AI response.
accessibilityRequirements: Search input must have aria-label='Semantic Search'
Results list must trap focus and allow up/down arrow key navigation.

technicalConstraints: The proposed 'instant search' skeleton loader conflicts with the vector database latency. We cannot guarantee results in under 500ms, which will make the UI feel broken if it expands instantly.
